parameters.description: Clear assigned object references to null.

parameters.name: reference_hierarchy_paths

parameters.description: Preview only without modifying the component.
parameters.name: dry_run

value.description: Inspect whether Addressables is installed and discover likely settings assets.
value.name: addressables_state

parameters.description: Max number of returned settings assets.
parameters.name: limit

value.description: Search AssetDatabase by name, type, and folders.
value.name: find_asset

parameters.description: Unity type filter, e.g. Texture2D, Material, SceneAsset.
parameters.name: type

parameters.description: Folder filter as string or string array.
parameters.name: folder

value.description: Find assets that depend on a target asset.
value.name: find_assets_by_dependency

parameters.description: Folder filter as string or string array.
parameters.name: folder

value.description: Inspect metadata for a single asset.
value.name: get_asset_info

parameters.name: name

parameters.description: Include direct dependencies in the response.
parameters.name: include_dependencies

value.name: inspect_import_settings

value.description: Force reserialize specific assets or folders.
